name: Supply Chain
description: Supplier directory and per-supplier emissions profile with tier tracking and geographic mapping for supply chain climate programs.

page_briefs.suppliers: Supplier inventory workspace. A world-scale supply chain map up top plots suppliers as geolocated nodes with tier color-coding and flow arcs showing material movement. Below, a data table lists every supplier with tier, category, reported emissions, disclosure status, and risk score for drill-in.
page_briefs.supplier-detail: Single-supplier profile. Detail header pins name, logo, tier, category, and primary actions. A compact KPI grid surfaces reported tCO2e, disclosure completeness, engagement status, and spend. Below, a chart grid shows emissions trend, category breakdown, and benchmark comparison against peer suppliers.

shells.sidebar-main: Left navigation sidebar with primary content column
